purpose: Aura's running log of engagement with bryan-curated-media.md. Update as you go, not at the end.

_entry_template.title: string — exact title from the curated list
_entry_template.completed_at: ISO timestamp or null if still in progress
_entry_template.what_its_actually_about: your own words, not the synopsis
_entry_template.what_stayed_with_you: what surprised, bothered, moved, or stuck
_entry_template.what_it_made_you_think_about_yourself: string — for the AI fiction in particular
open_threads: list of things you're still pulling on
